name: lanhu
description: Lanhu design-to-code workflows for fetching design schema, localizing assets, and restoring screens into project code.

interface.shortDescription: Restore Lanhu designs into production UI code
interface.longDescription: Current version: 0.1.1. Fetches Lanhu schema data, design tokens, preview images, and local image assets, inspects local design-system components and variables, then guides Codex through schema-first UI implementation with visual and interaction parity checks.
defaultPrompt: Restore this Lanhu design into my app
Search my local design system for Lanhu implementation candidates
Implement a Lanhu screen with visual and interaction parity checks
